Title: Config: Centralized configuration system
Description:
Single source of truth for all file paths, API settings, task definitions, and business rules.

**Code:** src/utils/config.py

**What it provides:**
- Directory paths (data_dir, agents_dir, companies_dir, etc.)
- API configuration (model, temperature, maxTokens)
- HTML culling rules (allowed tags, banner patterns, attribute stripping)
- Cookie dismissal selectors (configured + fuzzy keywords)
- Task configurations for all AI tasks (pickJobPages, vetJobPage, parseJobTag, scoreGET, scoreDO, scoreLIKE)
- Job state machine definitions
- ATS vendor patterns for detection
- Database retry configuration

**Impact:**
Enables config-driven development - all settings in one place, no hardcoded values scattered through codebase.

**Completed:** ~3 weeks ago

Title: Database: SQLite operations with retry logic
Description:
Robust database layer with automatic retry for transient errors and schema migration handling.

**Code:** src/data/database.py

**Features:**
- Posting table primitives (insert_job_if_not_exists, save_job, update_jobs_state)
- Batch processing support (set_batch_for_unclaimed, select_jobs_by_batch, clear_batch)
- Query functions (select_jobs_by_state, select_jobs_by_company)
- Company data management (save_company, remove_jobs_by_company)
- Timesheet logging for API cost tracking (add_timesheet_entry)
- Schema evolution with _ensure_posting_schema (handles LEGACY state migration)
- Retry logic for database-locked/busy conditions (config-driven: max_attempts, delays)
- Row-to-dict conversion helpers

**Impact:**
Reliable data persistence with automatic recovery from transient SQLite errors (locks, busy states).

**Completed:** ~2 weeks ago

Title: Playwright: Web scraping infrastructure
Description:
Complete Playwright integration for web scraping with smart content extraction and vendor detection.

**Code:** src/external/playwright.py

**Features:**
- Multi-browser support (Firefox → WebKit fallback)
- Cookie banner dismissal (configured selectors + fuzzy keyword search)
- Self-healing crawl (re-extract links after cookie dismissal if threshold not met)
- Vendor detection from page artifacts (network requests, iframes, HTML)
- Clickables extraction with priority merge (response_html > dom_early > dom_late)
- HTML culling for API payload reduction (strips scripts, styles, banners)
- Site crawling with configurable depth and verification
- Page content extraction (text, links, buttons, DOM)
- ATS iframe detection (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, etc.)
- Context manager for browser lifecycle
- Lazy loading support (scroll + "Load More" buttons)

**Impact:**
Robust web scraping that handles modern JS-heavy sites, widgets, and cookie banners.

**Completed:** ~3 weeks ago

Title: Anthropic: API client with prompt caching
Description:
Anthropic API client with intelligent prompt caching and labeled content blocks.

**Code:** src/external/anthropic.py

**Features:**
- File-based prompt system with auto-resolution (simple filenames + path-based)
- Prompt caching (4-block limit enforcement, ephemeral cache control)
- Labeled content blocks for task prompts (=== LABEL === headers)
- Binary file upload for PDFs via file server
- Auto-parsing (text, JSON, Python code formats)
- Timesheet logging integration (tokens, cost, context tracking)
- Timestamp prefix generation for prompts
- Config-driven API settings (model, temperature, maxTokens from ASTRAL_CONFIG)
- Error handling with structured response dict (success, api_response, parsed_response, timesheet)

**Impact:**
90% cost reduction via prompt caching; clean separation of system/task/content prompts.

**Completed:** ~2 weeks ago

Title: Consult: GET/DO/LIKE scoring system
Description:
Three-rubric evaluation system for job-candidate matching with AI analysis.

**Code:** src/core/consult.py

**Features:**
- GET scoring (can candidate get the job? - credentials match)
- DO scoring (can candidate do the job well? - excel at responsibilities)  
- LIKE scoring (would candidate like the job? - culture fit, preferences)
- Full pipeline with early stopping (score_job_full)
- Config-driven task definitions (labeled blocks for rubrics, resume, LinkedIn, preferences)
- Company context support for LIKE evaluation
- Threshold-based progression (skip DO/LIKE if GET fails)

**Impact:**
Automated job evaluation that mimics human decision-making process (GET → DO → LIKE).

**Completed:** ~1 week ago

Title: Cost tracking: Token usage and estimation
Description:
Cost calculation and tracking for Anthropic API usage with cache-aware pricing.

**Code:** src/utils/cost_calculator.py

**Features:**
- Simple cost calculation (input + output tokens)
- Cache-aware cost calculation (90% discount for cache reads, 25% markup for cache writes)
- Pricing constants for Claude Sonnet 4.5
- Integration with timesheet logging via database.add_timesheet_entry()

**Impact:**
Accurate cost tracking for API usage; enables budget monitoring and optimization decisions.

**Completed:** ~2 weeks ago

Title: Logging: Centralized logging utility
Description:
Standardized logging interface with debug prefixes and runtime control.

**Code:** src/utils/logging.py

**Features:**
- Prefixed logger wrapper ([ ~ ] prefix for debug messages)
- Test mode logging (.test() method with runtime flag control)
- Standard log levels (debug, info, warning, error, critical)
- No dependency on third-party libraries (uses Python standard logging)
- Simple configuration (logging.basicConfig with INFO level default)
- Avoids conflicts with third-party library debug output

**Impact:**
Clean, consistent logging across all modules; helps with debugging without noise from dependencies.

**Completed:** ~2 weeks ago
